name: Christopher Knight Home Perth 68.5" 5-Shelf Industrial Bookcase Antique: Metal & Wood, 250lbs Capacity
description:
Bring home a great addition to any interior space that provides ample shelf space for all of your books, knickknacks, and other displayable items. Our etagere bookcase features impressive display space with an open structure and X-frame stretcher. Not only does this piece bring you plenty of storage space but it also brings an expansive look for your home. Finished with firwood and a sturdy iron structure, this piece offers five delightful shelves that provide ample space for display and organization, allowing you to easily personalize your home.

INDUSTRIAL DESIGN: Our bookcase incorporates a sleek metal frame into its construction to create an understated industrial design. With a combination of iron and smooth wood shelves, this bookcase offers a raw, unfinished look to your home.

ETAGERE: Featuring open shelves for a clean, spacious look, our etagere bookcase is designed to exhibit a collection of ornaments. This design allows your space to feel more expansive and stylish.

FIRWOOD: The shelves of this bookcase are created with refined firwood for a resilient structure that features straight, tight grains. This durable wood less prone to warping or twisting due to its dense nature.

IRON FRAME: The sturdy construction of this iron frame ensures that this bookshelf will hold up under heavy use. This is reinforced with an X-frame iron stretcher on the back of the bookshelf.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This bookcase is 34.25” W x 13.50” D x 68.70” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming bookshelf.
